title: I Can't Announce My Conversion, Is My Islam Valid?
stanceSummary: In this answer, Yasir Qadhi addresses "I Can’t Announce My Conversion, Is My Islam Valid" and outlines the ruling with its main conditions and limits. He emphasizes following foundational Quranic and Sunnah principles while accounting for context, scholarly nuance, and practical realities for Muslims today.
